MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Gretchen Birkheimer, Esq. of Morgan, Franich, Fredkin & Marsh for plaintiff and opposing party Manfred Rice

RULING:
ARGUED and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows --
DEFENDANT JOEL GOLEBURN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED; 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. Prevailing party to submit form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR # 8189(301/PJB)
